---
title: "Team Matchup Report"
author: "Pat Rankin"
format: html
editor: visual
execute:
  message: false
  warning: false
---

```{r}
#| label: packages

# All packages used across sports — install any you haven't yet:
# install.packages("nflreadr")
# install.packages("baseballr")
# pak::pak("sportsdataverse/hoopR")
# pak::pak("sportsdataverse/hockeyR")
# install.packages("dplyr")
# install.packages("ggplot2")
# install.packages("tidyr")

library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyr)
```

## ⚙️ Your Settings — Change These Before Rendering

```{r}
#| label: settings

# ============================================================
#  FILL IN YOUR INFO BELOW — this is the only section
#  you need to change each time you run this report.
# ============================================================

# Which sport?
# Choose ONE of: "NBA"  |  "NCAA"  |  "NFL"  |  "NHL"  |  "MLB"
my_sport <- "NBA"

# Team 1 name or abbreviation (same format as the grade reports for this sport)
# NBA/NCAA: use location name  e.g. "Boston", "Duke"
# NFL: abbreviation            e.g. "KC", "BUF"
# NHL: abbreviation            e.g. "BOS", "EDM"
# MLB: abbreviation            e.g. "NYY", "LAD"
team_1 <- "Boston"

# Team 2 name or abbreviation
team_2 <- "Golden State"

# Which season? Same convention as the grade reports for this sport:
# NBA/NCAA: year season ENDS  (2025-26 = 2026)
# NFL: year season STARTS     (2024-25 = 2024)
# NHL: year season STARTS     (2024-25 = 2024)
# MLB: calendar year          (2024 = 2024)
season_year <- 2026

# Season label for display only
season_label <- "2025-26"

# ============================================================
#  THAT'S IT — scroll down to render and read your report.
# ============================================================
```

```{r}
#| label: ingest
#| include: false

load_team <- function(team_name, sport, season) {
  if (sport == "NBA") {
    library(hoopR)
    box <- hoopR::load_nba_team_box(seasons = season)
    data <- box %>%
      filter(team_location == team_name | team_name_col == team_name |
               team_short_display_name == team_name) %>%
      rename(team_name_col = team_name) %>%
      mutate(
        pts     = as.numeric(team_score),
        opp_pts = as.numeric(opponent_team_score),
        fg_pct  = as.numeric(field_goal_pct) * 100,
        three   = as.numeric(three_point_field_goal_pct) * 100,
        ft      = as.numeric(free_throw_pct) * 100,
        reb     = as.numeric(total_rebounds),
        ast     = as.numeric(assists),
        tov     = as.numeric(turnovers),
        won     = team_winner == TRUE
      )
  } else if (sport == "NCAA") {
    library(hoopR)
    box <- hoopR::load_mbb_team_box(seasons = season)
    data <- box %>%
      filter(team_location == team_name | team_name == team_name |
               team_short_display_name == team_name) %>%
      mutate(
        pts     = as.numeric(team_score),
        opp_pts = as.numeric(opponent_team_score),
        fg_pct  = as.numeric(field_goal_pct) * 100,
        three   = as.numeric(three_point_field_goal_pct) * 100,
        ft      = as.numeric(free_throw_pct) * 100,
        reb     = as.numeric(total_rebounds),
        ast     = as.numeric(assists),
        tov     = as.numeric(turnovers),
        won     = team_winner == TRUE
      )
  } else if (sport == "NFL") {
    library(nflreadr)
    sched <- nflreadr::load_schedules(seasons = season) %>%
      filter(game_type == "REG")
    home <- sched %>% filter(home_team == team_name, !is.na(home_score)) %>%
      transmute(pts=home_score, opp_pts=away_score, won=home_score>away_score)
    away <- sched %>% filter(away_team == team_name, !is.na(away_score)) %>%
      transmute(pts=away_score, opp_pts=home_score, won=away_score>home_score)
    data <- bind_rows(home, away) %>%
      mutate(fg_pct=NA, three=NA, ft=NA, reb=NA, ast=NA, tov=NA)
  } else if (sport == "NHL") {
    library(hockeyR)
    pbp <- hockeyR::load_pbp(seasons = season)
    scores <- pbp %>%
      group_by(game_id, home_abbreviation, away_abbreviation) %>%
      summarise(hg=max(home_final,na.rm=TRUE), ag=max(away_final,na.rm=TRUE), .groups="drop")
    home <- scores %>% filter(home_abbreviation==team_name) %>%
      transmute(pts=hg, opp_pts=ag, won=hg>ag)
    away <- scores %>% filter(away_abbreviation==team_name) %>%
      transmute(pts=ag, opp_pts=hg, won=ag>hg)
    data <- bind_rows(home, away) %>%
      mutate(fg_pct=NA, three=NA, ft=NA, reb=NA, ast=NA, tov=NA)
  } else if (sport == "MLB") {
    library(baseballr)
    log  <- baseballr::bref_team_results(Tm=team_name, yr=season)
    data <- log %>% filter(!is.na(R)) %>%
      mutate(pts=as.numeric(R), opp_pts=as.numeric(RA),
             won=grepl("^W",`W/L`),
             fg_pct=NA, three=NA, ft=NA, reb=NA, ast=NA, tov=NA)
  }
  data
}

d1 <- load_team(team_1, my_sport, season_year)
d2 <- load_team(team_2, my_sport, season_year)

if (nrow(d1) == 0) stop("No data found for Team 1: '", team_1, "'")
if (nrow(d2) == 0) stop("No data found for Team 2: '", team_2, "'")

summarise_team <- function(d) {
  d %>% summarise(
    games     = n(),
    wins      = sum(won, na.rm=TRUE),
    win_pct   = wins / games * 100,
    pts       = mean(pts,     na.rm=TRUE),
    opp_pts   = mean(opp_pts, na.rm=TRUE),
    pt_diff   = mean(pts - opp_pts, na.rm=TRUE),
    fg_pct    = mean(fg_pct,  na.rm=TRUE),
    three     = mean(three,   na.rm=TRUE),
    ft        = mean(ft,      na.rm=TRUE),
    reb       = mean(reb,     na.rm=TRUE),
    ast       = mean(ast,     na.rm=TRUE),
    tov       = mean(tov,     na.rm=TRUE)
  )
}

s1 <- summarise_team(d1)
s2 <- summarise_team(d2)
```

```{r}
#| label: build-comparison
#| include: false

pts_label <- switch(my_sport,
  "MLB" = "Runs Per Game",
  "NHL" = "Goals Per Game",
  "Points Per Game"
)

opp_label <- switch(my_sport,
  "MLB" = "Runs Allowed/G",
  "NHL" = "Goals Against/G",
  "Points Allowed/G"
)

diff_label <- switch(my_sport,
  "MLB" = "Run Differential",
  "NHL" = "Goal Differential",
  "Point Differential"
)

# Build a side-by-side comparison table
stat_names <- c("Record","Win %", pts_label, opp_label, diff_label)
vals_1     <- c(paste0(s1$wins,"-",(s1$games-s1$wins)),
                sprintf("%.1f%%", s1$win_pct),
                sprintf("%.1f",   s1$pts),
                sprintf("%.1f",   s1$opp_pts),
                sprintf("%+.1f",  s1$pt_diff))
vals_2     <- c(paste0(s2$wins,"-",(s2$games-s2$wins)),
                sprintf("%.1f%%", s2$win_pct),
                sprintf("%.1f",   s2$pts),
                sprintf("%.1f",   s2$opp_pts),
                sprintf("%+.1f",  s2$pt_diff))

# Add sport-specific shooting/pitching stats if available
if (my_sport %in% c("NBA","NCAA")) {
  stat_names <- c(stat_names, "FG%","3-Point%","FT%","Rebounds/G","Assists/G","Turnovers/G")
  vals_1 <- c(vals_1,
              sprintf("%.1f%%", s1$fg_pct), sprintf("%.1f%%", s1$three),
              sprintf("%.1f%%", s1$ft),     sprintf("%.1f",   s1$reb),
              sprintf("%.1f",   s1$ast),    sprintf("%.1f",   s1$tov))
  vals_2 <- c(vals_2,
              sprintf("%.1f%%", s2$fg_pct), sprintf("%.1f%%", s2$three),
              sprintf("%.1f%%", s2$ft),     sprintf("%.1f",   s2$reb),
              sprintf("%.1f",   s2$ast),    sprintf("%.1f",   s2$tov))
}

comparison_tbl <- data.frame(Statistic=stat_names, !!team_1:=vals_1, !!team_2:=vals_2)

# Build chart data — numeric stats only
chart_data <- data.frame(
  Stat  = c(pts_label, opp_label, diff_label),
  T1    = c(s1$pts, s1$opp_pts, s1$pt_diff),
  T2    = c(s2$pts, s2$opp_pts, s2$pt_diff)
) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = c(T1, T2), names_to = "Team", values_to = "Value") %>%
  mutate(Team = recode(Team, T1 = team_1, T2 = team_2))

if (my_sport %in% c("NBA","NCAA")) {
  extra <- data.frame(
    Stat = c("FG%","3-Point%","FT%","Rebounds/G","Assists/G"),
    T1   = c(s1$fg_pct, s1$three, s1$ft, s1$reb, s1$ast),
    T2   = c(s2$fg_pct, s2$three, s2$ft, s2$reb, s2$ast)
  ) %>%
    pivot_longer(cols=c(T1,T2), names_to="Team", values_to="Value") %>%
    mutate(Team=recode(Team, T1=team_1, T2=team_2))
  chart_data <- bind_rows(chart_data, extra)
}

chart_data <- chart_data %>% filter(!is.na(Value))
```

## `r team_1` vs. `r team_2` — `r my_sport` | `r season_label`

---

## Head-to-Head Stat Comparison

```{r}
#| label: comparison-table

knitr::kable(comparison_tbl, align = c("l","r","r"))
```

## Side-by-Side Chart

```{r}
#| label: comparison-chart

ggplot(chart_data, aes(x = Stat, y = Value, fill = Team)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge", width = 0.65) +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("#3498db","#e74c3c")) +
  geom_text(aes(label = sprintf("%.1f", Value)),
            position = position_dodge(width = 0.65), vjust = -0.4, size = 3.2) +
  labs(
    title    = paste(team_1, "vs.", team_2, "— Season Averages"),
    subtitle = paste(my_sport, season_label),
    x        = NULL,
    y        = "Value",
    fill     = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 13) +
  theme(legend.position = "top",
        axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 25, hjust = 1))
```

## Scoring Trends Side by Side

```{r}
#| label: trend-chart

pts_label_short <- switch(my_sport, "MLB"="Runs","NHL"="Goals","Points")

trend1 <- d1 %>% mutate(game_num=row_number(), team=team_1)
trend2 <- d2 %>% mutate(game_num=row_number(), team=team_2)

bind_rows(trend1, trend2) %>%
  ggplot(aes(x=game_num, y=pts, color=team)) +
  geom_smooth(se=FALSE, linewidth=1.2) +
  geom_point(alpha=0.3, size=1.5) +
  scale_color_manual(values=c("#3498db","#e74c3c")) +
  labs(
    title    = paste(team_1, "vs.", team_2, "—", pts_label_short, "Scored (Smoothed Trend)"),
    subtitle = paste(my_sport, season_label),
    x        = "Game Number", y = pts_label_short, color = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size=13) +
  theme(legend.position="top")
```

## Advantage Summary

```{r}
#| label: advantage-summary

adv_df <- data.frame(
  Category  = c(pts_label, opp_label, diff_label, "Win %"),
  Team_1    = c(s1$pts, s1$opp_pts, s1$pt_diff, s1$win_pct),
  Team_2    = c(s2$pts, s2$opp_pts, s2$pt_diff, s2$win_pct),
  Lower_Better = c(FALSE, TRUE, FALSE, FALSE)
) %>%
  mutate(
    Advantage = case_when(
      !Lower_Better & Team_1 > Team_2 ~ team_1,
      !Lower_Better & Team_2 > Team_1 ~ team_2,
      Lower_Better  & Team_1 < Team_2 ~ team_1,
      Lower_Better  & Team_2 < Team_1 ~ team_2,
      TRUE ~ "Even"
    )
  ) %>%
  select(Category, Advantage)

t1_adv <- sum(adv_df$Advantage == team_1)
t2_adv <- sum(adv_df$Advantage == team_2)

knitr::kable(adv_df, col.names = c("Category","Advantage"))
```

**Advantages:** `r team_1` wins **`r t1_adv`** of `r nrow(adv_df)` categories | `r team_2` wins **`r t2_adv`** of `r nrow(adv_df)` categories
